title: Cognizant: Strong Demand And Pricing Power To Be Profitable Despite Higher Wages
text: Cognizant is a multinational company that provides IT business consulting. As evidenced by a high book-to-bill ratio, the company is seeing high demand for its services. However, many of its employees are quitting their jobs, the labor market remains tight with the problems exacerbated by high wage inflation.

title: Cognizant, Microsoft Team On Remote Patient Monitoring, Other Health Tools
text: Cognizant has announced a partnership with Microsoft to help deliver a health solution for remote patient monitoring, according to a press release Tuesday (March 1). The solution is intended to boost the quality of medical care.
